{{CargoRelic
|name=Opera Phantom
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=11-05
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.2%)
|description=On Nov 5, 1911, Leroux published this mysterious and intriguing novel. 

This dance performance tells the story of an architect with singing talent, who, however, could only perform with a mask due to his ugly appearance, which led to his twisted personality and the way he saw people as enemies. After he fell in love with a dancer named Christine, he kidnapped her. The incident resulted in an irreparable tragedy. This was inspired by the story of "Beauty and the Beast," but the author recreated it by adding horror elements to tell a tragic yet poignant love story.
|fame=32
|art=46
|fth=24
|civ=26
|tech=26
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +6m
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +12m
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +18m
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +30m
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +30m<br>Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +30m (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail ATK +20
}}

[[Category:Demon Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Power Boost]]
